items: Resin parts weighing 100 g or more are marked with material indications (e.g. Honda>PP<).
How to read the display symbols: > (resin material symbol) - (supplementary explanation symbol) <
材質表示の＞PA6＜、＞PA66＜、＞PA612＜は、材質表示＞PA＜の樹脂特性を参照すること。
加熱する場合は、樹脂部品に充分注意して行うこと。​

rows: ※ The heat-resistant temperature here means "the temperature at which thermal deformation may occur during operation.
